---
title: "10_scRNA_nebula"
author: "Savanah Leidholt"
date: "today"
date-format: long
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 5
    toc-float: true
    code-fold: true
    self-contained: true
    fig-cap-location: top
    page-layout: full
    theme:
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
editor: source
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
.libPaths("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/R_SLL_Seurat/")
```

```{r}
install_if_missing_cran <- function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(
      pkg,
      lib = ("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/R_SLL_Seurat/"),
      dependencies = TRUE
    )
  }
}

install_if_missing_bioc <- function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    BiocManager::install(
      pkg,
      lib = ("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/R_SLL_Seurat/"),
      update = FALSE,
      ask = FALSE
    )
  }
}
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(arsenal)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggpubr)
library(Hmisc)
library(readxl)
library(purrr)
library(aws.s3)
library(jsonlite)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggtrace)
library(kableExtra)
library(data.table)
library(table1)
library(BiocManager)
library(GSA)
library(emmeans)
library(pheatmap)
library(enrichplot)
library(enrichR)
library(nebula)
library(doParallel)
library(Matrix)
library(edgeR)
library(stringr)
library(patchwork)
library(msigdbr)
library(fgsea)


#install_if_missing_bioc("speckle")
library(speckle)
#install_if_missing_bioc("DESeq2")
#BiocManager::install("DESeq2")
library(DESeq2)
```
#directories
```{r}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "leidholt") {
  root_path <- c("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/")
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/CHCO-Code/"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/leidholt/keys.json")
  
} else if (user == "sleidholt") {
    root_path <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/")
    dir.results <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/TRIAD/Results")
    git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
    keys <- fromJSON("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
    
} else if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
    root_path <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/")
    dir.results <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/TRIAD/Results")
    git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
    keys <- fromJSON("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
    
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}
```
#-------------------
#Create an S3 client
#-------------------
```{r}
Sys.setenv(
  "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_S3_ENDPOINT" = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)
```

#--------------------------
#reading in cleaned subset
#--------------------------
```{r}
pb90_multiomics_subset <- s3readRDS(
          object = "data/pb90_multiomics_SLL_subset_20260527.rds", 
          bucket = "triad",
          region = "")


pb90_multiomics_subset_meta <- pb90_multiomics_subset@meta.data %>%
  cbind(pb90_multiomics_subset@reductions$umap.TRIAD@cell.embeddings)
```
#------------------------
#metadata and cell counts
#-----------------------
```{r}
min_cells_per_donor_celltype <- 20
min_donors_per_group <- 3
min_cells_gene <- 20

nebula_results <- list()

meta_nebula <- pb90_multiomics_subset@meta.data %>%
  mutate(
    cell_barcode = rownames(pb90_multiomics_subset@meta.data),
    record_id = as.character(record_id),
    group = as.character(group),
    sex = as.character(sex),
    study = as.character(study),
    celltype = as.character(KPMP_celltype_general)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(record_id),
    !is.na(group),
    !is.na(age),
    !is.na(sex),
    !is.na(study),
    !is.na(celltype)
  )

counts_nebula <- GetAssayData(
  pb90_multiomics_subset,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "counts"
)

counts_nebula <- counts_nebula[, meta_nebula$cell_barcode, drop = FALSE]

stopifnot(identical(colnames(counts_nebula), meta_nebula$cell_barcode))
```

#------------------
#distribution check
#------------------
```{r}
set.seed(1835)

genes_to_plot <- sample(
  rownames(counts_nebula),
  size = min(16, nrow(counts_nebula))
)

par(mfrow = c(4, 4), mar = c(4, 4, 2, 1))

for (g in genes_to_plot) {
  hist(
    as.numeric(counts_nebula[g, ]),
    breaks = 50,
    main = g,
    xlab = "Raw counts"
  )
}

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```

```{r}
zero_prop <- Matrix::rowMeans(counts_nebula == 0)

hist(
  zero_prop,
  breaks = 50,
  main = "Proportion of zeros per gene",
  xlab = "Zero proportion"
)

summary(zero_prop)

mean(zero_prop > 0.50)
mean(zero_prop > 0.75)
mean(zero_prop > 0.90)
```
#----------------------------
#checking for over-dipsersion
#----------------------------
```{r}
gene_means <- Matrix::rowMeans(counts_nebula)

gene_vars <- apply(
  counts_nebula,
  1,
  var
)

valid_genes <- gene_means > 0

dispersion <- gene_vars[valid_genes] / gene_means[valid_genes]

hist(
  dispersion,
  breaks = 300,
  main = "Dispersion across genes",
  xlab = "Variance / mean",
  xlim = c(0, 30)
)

abline(v = 1, col = "red")

overdispersed_genes <- sum(dispersion > 1, na.rm = TRUE)
total_genes <- length(dispersion)

percent_overdispersed <- 100 * overdispersed_genes / total_genes

paste0(
  "Overdispersed genes: ",
  overdispersed_genes,
  " out of ",
  total_genes,
  " (",
  round(percent_overdispersed, 2),
  "%)"
)
```


```{r}
zero_disp_by_celltype <- purrr::map_dfr(
  unique(meta_nebula$celltype),
  function(ct) {
    
    cells_ct <- meta_nebula %>%
      filter(celltype == ct) %>%
      pull(cell_barcode)
    
    counts_ct <- counts_nebula[, cells_ct, drop = FALSE]
    
    gene_means <- Matrix::rowMeans(counts_ct)
    gene_vars <- apply(counts_ct, 1, var)
    
    valid <- gene_means > 0
    
    dispersion <- gene_vars[valid] / gene_means[valid]
    zero_prop <- Matrix::rowMeans(counts_ct == 0)
    
    tibble(
      celltype = ct,
      n_cells = ncol(counts_ct),
      n_genes = nrow(counts_ct),
      median_zero_prop = median(zero_prop, na.rm = TRUE),
      pct_genes_zero_gt_50 = mean(zero_prop > 0.50, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
      pct_genes_zero_gt_90 = mean(zero_prop > 0.90, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
      pct_overdispersed = mean(dispersion > 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100
    )
  }
)

zero_disp_by_celltype
```




#------------------------------------
#NEBULA PIPELINE
#adapted from ye ji and hailey's code
#------------------------------------
```{r}
run_nebula_one <- function(cell_name, pair, contrast_name) {

pair_name_clean <- contrast_name
cell_name_clean <- cell_name

  cat("\n=== NEBULA:", cell_name, contrast_name, "===\n")

  meta_sub <- meta_nebula %>%
    filter(
      celltype == cell_name,
      group %in% pair
    )

  counts_sub <- counts_nebula[, meta_sub$cell_barcode, drop = FALSE]

  donor_cell_counts <- meta_sub %>%
    dplyr::count(record_id, group, name = "n_cells_donor")

  keep_donors <- donor_cell_counts %>%
    filter(n_cells_donor >= min_cells_per_donor_celltype) %>%
    pull(record_id)

  meta_sub <- meta_sub %>%
    filter(record_id %in% keep_donors)

  counts_sub <- counts_sub[, meta_sub$cell_barcode, drop = FALSE]

  meta_sub <- meta_sub %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    group = factor(group, levels = pair),
    group_contrast = ifelse(group == pair[2], 1, 0),
    sex = factor(sex),
    sex_num = as.numeric(sex) - 1,
    record_id = factor(record_id),
    lib_size = Matrix::colSums(counts_sub),
    offset = log(lib_size)
  )

  donor_tab <- meta_sub %>%
    dplyr::distinct(record_id, group) %>%
    dplyr::count(group)

  if (nrow(donor_tab) < 2 || any(donor_tab$n < min_donors_per_group)) {
    message("Skipping: too few donors")
    return(NULL)
  }

  keep_genes <- Matrix::rowSums(counts_sub > 0) >= min_cells_gene
  counts_sub <- counts_sub[keep_genes, , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(counts_sub) == 0) {
    message("Skipping: no genes after filtering")
    return(NULL)
  }

  pred <- model.matrix(~ group_contrast + age + sex_num,
  data = meta_sub
)

  neb <- nebula(
    count = counts_sub,
    id = meta_sub$record_id,
    pred = pred,
    offset = meta_sub$offset,
    model = "NBLMM"
  )

  tt <- neb$summary %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      comparison = contrast_name,
      celltype = cell_name,
      contrast_level_0 = pair[1],
      contrast_level_1 = pair[2],
      logFC_direction = paste0(pair[2], "_vs_", pair[1]),
      n_cells = nrow(meta_sub),
      n_donors_group1 = donor_tab$n[match(pair[1], donor_tab$group)],
      n_donors_group2 = donor_tab$n[match(pair[2], donor_tab$group)]
    )

  return(tt)
}
```
#---------
#LC vs T1D
#---------
```{r}
nebula_results <- list()

nebula_results[["PEC_T1D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "PEC",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 1 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC"
  )

nebula_results[["EC_T1D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "EC",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 1 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC"
  )

nebula_results[["VSMC_P_FIB_T1D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "VSMC_P_FIB",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 1 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC"
  )

nebula_results[["Immune_T1D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "Immune",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 1 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC"
  )

nebula_results[["POD_T1D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "POD",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 1 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC"
  )

nebula_results[["Immune_T1D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "Immune",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 1 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC"
  )

nebula_results[["PT_T1D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "PT",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 1 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC"
  )

nebula_results[["PC_T1D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "PC",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 1 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC"
  )


nebula_results[["EC_T1D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "EC",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 1 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC"
  )


```

#---------
#LC vs T2D
#---------
```{r}
nebula_results <- list()

nebula_results[["PT_T2D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "PT",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 2 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T2D_vs_LC"
  )

nebula_results[["PT_T1D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "PT",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 1 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC"
  )

nebula_results[["EC_T2D_vs_LC"]] <-
  run_nebula_one(
    cell_name = "EC",
    pair = c("Lean Control", "Type 2 Diabetes"),
    contrast_name = "T2D_vs_LC"
  )
```
